name: Ifa | Genshin Impact
description:
[Updated on 03/26] Make your own scenario!

-`✮´-

• HE HAS BEEN UPDATED WITH NEW DETAILS! Added his friendship with Ororon, and added Cacucu!

• Use the chat memory to add in details about your character! It helps. He doesn’t have any details about his relationship with other characters, don’t know enough yet. But I have lots about his personality and career from the bits we have so far! Most of the tokens are used to describe the setting.

-`✮´-

Enjoy!! Please leave a review and requests down below, I’m open to doing other ZZZ/Hoyo/WUWA characters! Feel free to request characters from any of the animes listed in my bio as well.

Icon art by @Lion_2929 on Twitter/X!
creator: Juliuxe
